sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72393" key="oi)ktiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰκτ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n72393.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">expressive of pity</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lamentation, An.Bachm.</tr_> 2.290.</sense> </entryFree>
